info.title: HarvestERP
info.description: Combine Harvester Spare Parts Import Management System

post.description: Authenticate user and return JWT tokens.
Refresh an access token using httpOnly cookie or body.
Revoke the refresh token server-side and clear the cookie.

get.description: Return the current authenticated user's profile and roles.
Get dashboard summary stats
Get 10 most recent orders with full details
Get orders in production or transit stages for dashboard
List pending client inquiries for admin dashboard.
Get recent order updates for activity feed
List orders with filters and pagination

post.description: Create a new draft order — admin/operations only

get.description: Get count of orders per status (for filter sidebar)
Client-facing statement of account: payments made vs order totals.

Full reconciliation summary for a completed order.
Shows: original PI, revised PI, payments, delivery, claims, and net position.
Get full order with items

put.description: Update order header (only in DRAFT or COMPLETED_EDITING status) — admin/operations only

delete.description: Soft delete order with reason. Admin can delete any order.

post.description: Create a client-initiated order inquiry. CLIENT role only.

get.description: Get product requests (Quick Add items) linked to an order.

post.description: Admin approves a CLIENT_DRAFT inquiry, advancing it to DRAFT.

put.description: Set or update deletion reason on a soft-deleted order.

post.description: Manually fetch pending after-sales carry-forward and unloaded items into an existing order.
Parse pasted text lines of 'CODE [QTY]', validate each, and return preview results.
Apply resolved bulk text items — delegates to add_order_items logic.
Add items to an order (editable stages or mid-production)
Client or admin confirms/rejects a pending mid-order item.
Bulk approve/reject all PENDING items in an order. Assigns same lot number to all approved items.
Admin sends pricing notification to client for pending items.

put.description: Update an order item (quantity, notes)

delete.description: Remove item from order (soft delete — mark as REMOVED) — backward compatible DELETE

put.description: Remove item from order (soft delete — mark as REMOVED) with optional cancel_note

Update factory price, markup, and/or selling price for an order item.
Allowed at PENDING_PI or COMPLETED_EDITING stage, or for PENDING mid-order items.

post.description:
Recalculate all derived prices for an order.

For ALL orders: recalculates selling_price and selling_price_inr from
factory_price, markup_percent, and exchange_rate.
For TRANSPARENCY orders: also recalculates client_factory_price.
If refresh_rate=true, fetches the latest exchange rate from the DB first.

parameters.name: refresh_rate

schema.description: Fetch latest exchange rate from DB before recalculating
schema.title: Refresh Rate

parameters.description: Fetch latest exchange rate from DB before recalculating

post.description:
Copy factory prices from past same-factory orders, per-part.
For each item, finds its most recent price from ANY past order with the same factory.
Items with no past order history are flagged as 'not_found'.

Reset after-sales carry-forward items to their correct fixed prices.
Replace → factory=0, selling=0; Compensate → factory=0, selling=-(original selling_price_inr).

Parse an Excel file to extract product codes + prices.
Returns matched/unmatched lists for the frontend to preview before applying.

get.description: Get available next and previous stages for an order.

put.description: Move order to next stage.
Re-open a completed order for editing — admin only.
Move order back to its previous status.
Jump order directly to a reachable stage.

get.description:
Client-friendly activity feed built from audit logs.
Translates raw audit actions into human-readable timeline events.

Get order timeline — all status changes would be tracked here.
For now, return computed stage progression based on current status.

post.description: Upload and parse a packing list Excel for the order.
Create packing list manually (alternative to Excel upload).

get.description: Client-safe read-only packing summary. No pallet numbers, no factory data.
Get packing list with all items for an order.

delete.description: Delete the packing list and all its items for re-upload.

patch.description: Update a single packing list item (e.g., pallet assignment).

post.description: Split a packing list item into multiple sub-rows with different pallet assignments.
Undo a split — delete sub-rows, restore parent.
Set shipping decision for a partially ready item.

get.description: Download packing list as formatted Excel with product images.
Download packing list as landscape PDF with product images.

post.description: Migrate selected items to unloaded status for carry-forward to next order.
Undo migration — restore items back to ACTIVE status.

get.description: Get production start date, target date, percent complete, and days remaining.

put.description: Set production start date and/or target completion date.

get.description: Download the PI Excel for an order. Accessible by both admin and client users.
Generate and download PI with images. Accessible by both admin and client users.

post.description: Create a new query thread with the first message.

get.description: List queries for an order. Optionally filter by item or status.
Get query counts by status for tab badge.
Get a single query with all messages.

delete.description: Delete a query and all its messages. Only the creator or admin can delete.

post.description: Add a text reply to a query thread.
Reply with a file attachment (image, video, PDF).

put.description: Mark a query as resolved with a conclusion remark. Only admin/factory can resolve.
Reopen a resolved query.

post.description:
Quick inline query — creates or appends to the latest open query for this item.
Like typing into the Excel query column.

get.description:
Authenticated download of a query thread attachment (image, video, or file).
CLIENT users can only access attachments on their own orders.

Get per-item query status for the inline column display.
Returns: { item_id: { status, last_query, last_reply, query_id } }

Authenticated download of a product catalog image (factory_image_path).
Path is whitelisted to the products/ subdirectory only.
Any valid authenticated user may access product catalog images.

parameters.name: path

schema.description: Relative path within uploads, e.g. products/abc/image.jpg
schema.title: Path

parameters.description: Relative path within uploads, e.g. products/abc/image.jpg

get.description:
List products with search and pagination.
By default only shows variant children (orderable products).
?show_parents=true  → include parent products
?group=true         → return parents with nested variants

parameters.name: sort_by

schema.description: Sort field: product_code, product_name, category, hs_code, variants, created_at
schema.title: Sort By

parameters.description: Sort field: product_code, product_name, category, hs_code, variants, created_at

post.description:
Create new product variant (child). Auto-creates parent if needed.
If replace_variant_id is set, updates that variant instead of creating new.

get.description: Get all distinct product categories from the products table
Get all distinct product brands from the products table
Get all distinct product subcategories from the products table
Get all distinct product materials
Get all distinct HS codes
Get all distinct part types
Quick search for product selector — only returns orderable variants (children).

post.description:
Validate bulk-pasted product codes.
Returns FOUND, NOT_FOUND, or AMBIGUOUS for each code.
AMBIGUOUS = same code matches multiple products (different material/name).
Soft-delete products (move to bin). Permanent deletion only from bin.

Update category, material, or hs_code for multiple products at once.
Only non-null fields in the request are applied.
Scan all products — remove duplicate images (same file hash) keeping one per unique image.
Remove DB records for product images whose files are missing from disk.

Re-extract product images from the latest uploaded Excel file in temp directory.
Matches Excel rows to existing products by product_code, extracts images, saves to disk.

get.description: Find TRUE duplicate children under the same parent (not intentional variants).
List soft-deleted (archived) products

post.description: Permanently delete soft-deleted products from the bin (removes all data + files)
Restore soft-deleted products from the bin back to active catalog

Mark a variant child as the default for its parent group.
Unsets is_default on all siblings, sets it on the target.

get.description: List product requests pending approval (Admin only). Reads from product_requests table.

post.description:
Admin maps a product request to an existing real product.
Creates OrderItem in the linked order and grants client access.
Admin rejects a product request with a remark. Notifies client.

get.description: Get single product by ID

put.description: Update existing product (variant or parent)

get.description:
Check if a product code already has existing variants.
Used by ProductForm to decide whether to show the variant resolution dialog.

post.description: Admin approves a product request. Creates real Product + OrderItem.

get.description:
Get all images for a product.

For parent products, also includes images from child variants so
the parent detail page shows all variant images.

post.description: Upload a single image for a product. Saves to disk and creates DB record.

delete.description: Delete a single product image (DB record + file on disk)

get.description: List factories with search and pagination
Quick search for factory selector (used in order creation)
List clients with search and pagination
Quick search for client selector (used in order creation)
Get assigned product categories for a client.
Get assigned product brands for a client.
Get per-product access exceptions for a client.
Get client portal tab permissions.
List all documents for an order

post.description: Upload a document for an order

get.description: Download a document by ID

post.description:
Upload an Excel file. Streams to disk in chunks (not memory).
Returns job_id immediately. Processing happens in background.
Analyze Excel column headers using AI and return mapping suggestions.
Use AI to suggest resolution actions for conflict groups.

get.description: Get current status of a processing job.

delete.description: Cancel a pending/processing job and clean up temp file.

get.description: List processing jobs with optional filters.

post.description: Re-trigger parsing for an existing job.
Apply parsed Excel results to create products and order items.
Generate a clean Proforma Invoice Excel for the client.

get.description: Download the latest PI for an order.
Generate and download a PI Excel with product images embedded in cells.
List service providers, optionally filtered by role or search text.

post.description: Create a new service provider.

get.description: Get a single service provider by ID.

put.description: Update a service provider.

get.description: List all shipments for an order.

post.description: Create a new shipment (container booking) for an order.

put.description: Update shipment details.

delete.description: Delete a shipment and its item allocations.

post.description: Allocate packing list items to a shipment container.

put.description: Update an item allocation (qty or pallet number).

delete.description: Remove an item from a shipment.

put.description: Transition shipment to LOADED phase.
Transition shipment to SAILED phase.
Transition shipment to ARRIVED phase.

get.description: Get time-based shipping progress (0-100%) and phase info.
List all shipping documents for an order.

put.description: Upload a file for a shipping document.
Update a shipping document status (e.g. mark as RECEIVED without upload).

get.description:
Authenticated download of a shipping document file (BOL, COO, CI, PL).
CLIENT users require the show_shipping portal permission on their own orders.
FACTORY users are blocked. INTERNAL users pass through.
List unloaded items with pagination and optional filters.

Get PENDING unloaded items for a specific client+factory pair.
Used when creating a new order to auto-add carry-forward items.
List after-sales items for an order. Auto-populate from packing list if none exist.

post.description: Batch save/update after-sales items for an order.

get.description:
Download consolidated after-sales Excel report with 2 sheets:
Sheet 1: Stock Report (all items grouped by pallet)
Sheet 2: After-Sales Issues (only flagged items, color-coded by issue type)

put.description: Update a single after-sales item.

post.description: Upload a photo for an after-sales item.

delete.description: Delete a photo from an after-sales item.

put.description: Resolve an after-sales item with resolution type and carry-forward. ADMIN only.

get.description: Get PENDING carry-forward claims for a client+factory pair.

Global list of after-sales items with optional filters.
By default, excludes CLOSED items with no issue (OK items).
Client view of after-sales items — read-only for resolution fields.

post.description: Client submits claims — can only set received_qty, issue, description, claim_qty.

get.description:
Authenticated download of an after-sales evidence photo.
Applies the same RLS as the after-sales item endpoints via _check_order_access.

post.description: Client uploads evidence photo for a claim.

get.description: List all client payments for an order + financial summary.

post.description: Record a client payment. amount_inr computed server-side.

put.description: Update a client payment record — admin/finance only.

post.description: Admin approves or rejects a client-submitted payment.

get.description: List all factory payments for an order + total summary.

post.description: Record a factory payment. Each remittance has its own method + exchange rate.

put.description: Update a factory payment record.

get.description: Return all payment audit log entries for an order, newest first.
Return PI revision history for an order — all past PI values.
Return exchange rates as a map for quick form lookups.
List available credits for a client.

post.description: Apply an available client credit as advance payment on an order.

get.description: List all orders with outstanding balances.
Get full payment ledger for a client across all orders.
List available credits for a factory.

post.description: Apply an available factory credit as payment on an order.

get.description: Get double-entry ledger for a factory: order values as debits, payments as credits.
Download client ledger as Excel or PDF.
Download factory ledger as Excel or PDF.

post.description: Client submits a payment with proof file. Goes to PENDING_VERIFICATION.

get.description: Download payment proof file.
Get full landed cost breakdown for a transparency client order.
Download landed cost as Excel file.
Get all exchange rates as list (for settings page)

get.description: Get exchange rates as key-value map (for quick lookup in forms)
Get all active categories with markup %

Get all port-to-port transit times

put.description: Update transit time for a route

post.description: Seed default settings data (run once on first startup)

get.description: List audit log entries with pagination and filters. Admin only.
Return distinct action types for filter dropdowns.
Return distinct resource types for filter dropdowns.
List all users (Admin only).

post.description: Create a new user (Admin only).

get.description: Get a single user by ID (Admin only).

put.description: Update an existing user (Admin only).

delete.description: Deactivate a user (Admin only). Does not hard-delete.

get.description: List notifications for current user.
Get unread notification count.

put.description: Mark a notification as read.
Mark all notifications for a specific resource as read (e.g. query notifications for an order).
Mark all notifications as read for current user.
